examples: Another is the admonition not to throw your pearls before swine, not to preach to those who can't hear, or won't be perceptive.
One morning, he threw him this admonition.
Part of apostolic nurture was seen in rebuke and admonition.
What my grandmother Bari Bauwa had to say was much more than a simple admonition.
One area in which that admonition is badly needed is the integrity of the dollar.
